description: Privacy-first Google Health API MCP server for health, sleep, activity and HR agents
name: io.github.BerkKilicoglu/google-health-fitbit-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Google Cloud OAuth client ID for Google Health API. Optional when configured with google-health-fitbit-mcp-server setup.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_HEALTH_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Google Cloud OAuth client secret. Prefer google-health-fitbit-mcp-server setup so this secret is stored in ~/.google-health-mcp/config.json instead of MCP client config.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_HEALTH_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Redirect URI configured in the Google Cloud OAuth client. Optional when configured with google-health-fitbit-mcp-server setup.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_HEALTH_REDIRECT_URI

environmentVariables.description: Optional local path for OAuth tokens. Defaults to ~/.google-health-mcp/tokens.json.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_HEALTH_TOKEN_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Optional payload mode: summary, structured, or raw. Defaults to structured. raw means full Google Health API payloads, not continuous 24/7 raw sensor telemetry.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_HEALTH_PRIVACY_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Optional SQLite cache toggle. Set to true or sqlite to enable.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_HEALTH_CACHE

environmentVariables.description: Optional local SQLite cache path. Defaults to ~/.google-health-mcp/cache.sqlite.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_HEALTH_CACHE_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Set to true to bypass the in-memory HTTP response cache (60s TTL for GET only). POST/PUT/DELETE and 4xx/5xx responses are never cached regardless.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_HEALTH_NO_CACHE
